---
title: "Hi, I'm Madeline. Welcome to my website!"
---

# About Me

------------------------------------------------------------------------

Check out the [Lotterhos Lab Website](https://sites.google.com/site/katielotterhos/home) for more information about my lab and our research.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

_I made this website with Quarto. 
To learn more about Quarto websites visit <https://quarto.org/docs/websites>._
